meta_title: For Freelancers: SaaS starter kit to Solve can't debug code (Beginner Resource Page)
meta_description: Learn how to SaaS starter kit and overcome can't debug code. A Beginner-level Resource Page using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: SaaS Starter Kit to Solve Debugging Issues
content.seo_description: Stop struggling with broken code. Use our SaaS starter kit, Antigravity, and Claude Code to ship faster and impress your clients. Master debugging today.
content.answer_block: Stop wasting hours hunting syntax errors. A SaaS starter kit provides a battle-tested architecture, pre-configured with error handling and logging. By combining Antigravity for structural generation and Claude Code for iterative debugging, you eliminate manual troubleshooting, enabling you to ship robust, client-ready applications at double your current speed.
content.intro:
You’re staring at a terminal full of red text, the client deadline is breathing down your neck, and you’ve spent six hours chasing a ghost in the stack trace. The promise of freelance freedom feels more like a prison of endless bug-fixing. You didn't become a developer to be a glorified debugger; you became one to build.

There is a better way. Instead of reinventing the wheel, you leverage a SaaS starter kit—a foundation built for scale and stability. By pairing this with AI-driven tooling, you shift from struggling with code to orchestrating it. It’s time to stop fixing broken features and start shipping products that actually work on the first try.

steps.title: Initialize the Foundation
steps.description: Standardize your repository structure using a proven starter kit to ensure consistency across all client projects.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a clean, modular SaaS architecture following clean architecture principles, including pre-configured error boundaries and centralized logging middleware.

steps.title: Isolate the Bug
steps.description: Use Claude Code to perform a diagnostic sweep of the codebase to identify the specific failure point.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the current codebase for common anti-patterns that lead to silent failures and suggest a refactor for better observability.

steps.title: Implement Defensive Coding
steps.description: Wrap unstable logic in robust error handling to prevent application crashes during client demos.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Rewrite the current service layer to include exhaustive try-catch blocks and custom exception mapping for better error reporting.
steps.claude_code_command: claude edit --instruction 'wrap all async calls in this file with robust error handling and logging'

steps.title: Automated Unit Testing
steps.description: Generate tests to ensure the bug never resurfaces during future deployments.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate comprehensive Jest unit tests covering edge cases for the recently patched module to ensure zero regression.

steps.title: Deploy with Confidence
steps.description: Validate the environment and push the fix to production using automated CLI workflows.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Verify the deployment configuration and ensure all environment variables are correctly mapped for the production build.

pro_tips: Always use a centralized 'error-boundary' component in your frontend to catch UI crashes before they reach the user.
Implement 'log-aggregator' middleware early; it turns debugging from a guessing game into a data-driven search.
Configure your git hooks to run a linter and type-checker on every commit to prevent syntax errors from ever entering your main branch.
Use AI-generated documentation for your API endpoints; if the code is self-documenting, debugging is 50% faster.
Treat your starter kit as a living product; every time you solve a bug, update the base template so you never have to solve it again.
content.next_steps: Once your first project is stable, focus on automating your deployment pipelines using CI/CD tools to move from manual debugging to zero-touch production updates.
content.conversion_block: Stop letting bugs define your freelance career. Build faster, charge more, and deliver professional-grade SaaS products every single time. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
